title: アグネスタキオン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Agnes Tachyon and I are about to
take on the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It begins today! We're meeting to have a
discussion about our future prospects and goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Or at least, that was the plan.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Guinea p—Trainer, you're awake, I see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come to my senses, and find myself standing on
a racetrack beneath a clear blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Relax, you're in a virtual dimension. In other
words, this is a VR experience. I took a
commercial product and tweaked it a tiny bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was so impressed that I didn't even notice the
weight of the headset. I begin to take it off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, hold up, stop your uncouth behavior! I'll
have you know my entire career as a researcher
hinges on this experiment!
choice_data_list: Wh-what do you mean by experiment?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you asked. You see, the more proficient
an athlete the more advanced their latent
cerebral functions are, generally speaking. By the
same token, Umamusume are no exception.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If the average homo sapiens sapiens like yourself were to, for example, acquire a body equivalent to that of an Umamusume, to what extent would your cerebral functions acclimate to the Umamusume body?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My aim is to quantify the differences between the
physical and cerebral functions of Umamusume,
and then utilize those findings for future
inventions. This is but the test run.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Long story short, I will have you do a partner run
with me here in this virtual dimension. Doesn't
that sound exciting?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come now, this marks the first day of our Twinkle
Series. Let's put in some effort!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She promptly puts my headset back on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This was supposed to be our first day working
together to take on the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now it's looking like I'll be wrapped up in
Agnes Tachyon's latest experiment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, I find myself at the starting
position.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Within the boundaries of this virtual dimension,
you have access to an Umamusume body which
your brain can control. This way, I can monitor
your latent cerebral functions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All you have to do is run the same way you always
do. Fixate your mind on the act of running, and
the rest will come naturally.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It may not seem natural at first, but you'll get the
hang of it the longer you run. So just relax, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears I have no choice. The once familiar
racetrack now looks like an entirely different
beast.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let me explain. Within this virtual dimension, I am
almost entirely my true self.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This virtual body reflects the physical capabilities
of my real one, but make no mistake—my brain is
the one in control.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So you can consider this a bona fide partner run
between us.
choice_data_list:
(I can't believe I'm really going to race against
Agnes Tachyon...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, the EMG and ECG devices are
recording. Heart rate and respiration are being
measured. Excellent! Excellent!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right. What matters here is that you give it
your one-hundred percent. Try and catch me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Listen to my words carefully. You are to try and catch me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, we are short on time! If that school
bell rings, it's going to be a real hassle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now... let the testing commence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the words leave her mouth, Agnes
Tachyon breaks into a dash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her speed seems to miraculously leave behind
traces of dust, her breath, her heartbeats, even
light, sound, and color!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Said to have a top speed of around seventy
kilometers per hour, the sight of an Umamusume
at full throttle is simply breathtaking.
choice_data_list: (There's no way my human body can keep up!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stand there gawking at her distant figure—the
one that was standing side by side with me just
seconds ago.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She relentlessly speeds further and further away. I
run after her in an effort to catch up, but the
distance doesn't shrink at all.
choice_data_list:
(I'm also using an Umamusume body, but she's
on a whole different level!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon may be a problem child obsessed
with her research, but her raw talent is undeniably
one of a kind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her need for speed is genuine, and she never
stops striving to reach new top speeds.
choice_data_list: (See, you can do it if you try!)
(See, you can do it if you try!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey! You finally made it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even this far away, I feel like I can hear Agnes
Tachyon's smug remark.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, how do you feel?
choice_data_list: I was reminded of how fast you are!
I was reminded of how fast you are!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Please, that's common knowledge! Any other
observations? How did the run feel?
choice_data_list:
I think I finally understand why you pursue the
potential of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? The run must have been a real
eye-opener for you then!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm pleased that we see eye to eye! Future
discussions will be easier now that we have
reached this consensus. An unexpected outcome,
but a favorable one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, you still haven't given me a proper
answer. Ah, right, allow me to rephrase the
question.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Does it hurt anywhere? How fatigued do you
feel?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running at a speed I never could before, my
body is still reeling from the resulting headache
and dizziness.
choice_data_list: I might topple over at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? How utterly fascinating! I see, I
see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a short bout of excitement, Agnes Tachyon
waves goodbye, seemingly satisfied with the
collected data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your cooperation with today's
experiment. Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, she turns on her heel and walks off.
Once I lose sight of her, I turn around and start
heading back to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember we're supposed to be having a
meeting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What is it now? I'm in the middle of something.
choice_data_list: We have to continue our discussion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, you remembered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let us postpone the meeting for tomorrow! As of
this moment, I have important things to attend
to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can join you tomorrow if circumstances allow. If
it turns out I cannot, well...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No need to get so worked up. Besides, even if I
were to promise to attend...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no guarantee that you would be able to
come, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her ominous word, a persistent, acute
dizziness prevents me from taking even one step
outside.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer, having the chance to experience the
wonders and mystery behind Umamusume-kind is
worth any sacrifice, wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She spares just five minutes of her time for a visit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Either way, my days exploring the limits of
Umamusume potential with Agnes Tachyon have
begun!
